revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Moldavian SSR]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Moldavian SSR]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Charles Essie moved page [[Template:Country data Moldavian SSR]] to [[Template:Country data Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic]]: consistency with main article
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Country data Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic]]
{{R from move}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: fix double redirect to final target
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:en:Template:Country data Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic | shortname alias = Moldavian SSR | flag alias = Flag of Moldavian SSR.svg | flag alias-1925 = Flag of Moldavian Autonomous Soviet Socialist Republic (1925-1932).svg | flag alias-1937 = Flag of Moldavian Autonomous Soviet Socialist Republic (1937-1938).svg | flag alias-1938 = Flag of Moldavian Autonomous Soviet Socialist Republic.svg | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic (1941-1952).svg | flag alias-1990 = Flag of Moldova.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1925 | var2 = 1937 | var3 = 1938 | var4 = 1940 | var5 = 1990 | redir1 = Moldavian SSR | related1 = Moldova </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Moldavian_SSR here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
